title: Architect Right-to-Left (RTL) & Logical Properties
description: Implement CSS Logical Properties (e.g., `margin-inline`, `padding-block`) for adaptable layouts. Ensure correct UI mirroring for Right-to-Left scripts using Bi-directional text isolation.
objectives: Implement CSS Logical Properties (e.g., `margin-inline`, `padding-block`) for adaptable layouts.
Ensure correct UI mirroring for Right-to-Left scripts using Bi-directional text isolation.
